about.title: Medhal Tourism Platform
about.description: Medhal is a smart tourism platform serving visitors to the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia from inside and outside the country, with full Arabic and English support. It gathers tourist, archaeological, and entertainment city information in one place, provides interactive maps and direct direction links, and displays hotels, restaurants, cafes, hospitals, fuel stations, shopping centers, and public facilities needed during the visitor journey. The platform aims to simplify trip planning, improve visitor experience, and highlight the diversity of Saudi tourism and heritage destinations.
